text:
おつかれ、センパイ。
おかげで突破口が見えたよ。

遠距離攻撃を仕掛けた時を狙うんだな。
上手くジャストアタックを当てれば
先手を打つこともできる……

さすが、センパイだよ。
今回もありがとな。
また

Nice work out there, boss. I've got a much
better idea of when to move in on them, now.

It's all about waiting for that moment they go
to use their ranged attacks, huh? You gotta hit
'em with a perfect attack first...

You're probably the only one who could've
shown me something like that, boss. Thanks
as always. Hope you don't mind me
bugging you again.
